metadata.description: Xenodot Twin — agents, skills, tools and hooks for AI-assisted digital-twin viewers on Godot. Ships two plugins: the engine-generic xenodot base and the xenodot-twin domain that composes it.

plugins.name: xenodot
plugins.description: Engine-generic base: builder/researcher agents, godot-* engine skills (verify, code-rules, export-builds, import), verification tools and safety hooks for Godot / Redot / Blazium work with Claude Code. The xenodot-twin plugin composes these via the xenodot: namespace.

plugins.name: xenodot-twin
plugins.description: Digital-twin domain: the twin-architect / scene-optimizer / data-binder agents and twin-import / twin-optimize / twin-bind-data / twin-verify / twin-playback skills for building IFC/BIM → Godot viewers with live data. Loads alongside the xenodot base and references its capabilities.
